examples: "Child, I cannot see anything," lamented the old woman.
"Now I'll never be able to go up to the pasture," lamented Clara.
He lamented how Indian captains were made idols and then "thrown in the gutter" by the public; the habit took off with him.
But in online chatrooms, many Escape fans have lamented the curvier look of the new Escape.
During a speech last week, Mr. Page lamented press reports about Google's competition versus other companies.
